name: German Sweet Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in boiling water. Cool.
2. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Blend in vanilla and cooled chocolate mixture.
5. Sift flour with baking soda and salt; add alternately with buttermilk to the chocolate mixture, beating after each addition until smooth.
6. Fold in beaten egg whites.
7. Pour batter into three 9-inch layer pans lined on bottoms with paper.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Cool.
10. Frost tops only.
For Coconut-Pecan Frosting:
1. Combine 1 cup evaporated milk, 1 cup sugar, 3 slightly beaten egg yolks, 1/2 cup butter, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until thickened, about 12 minutes.
3. Add 1 1/3 cups powdered sugar (angel flake coconut) and 1 cup chopped pecans.
4. Cool until thick enough to spread, beating occasionally.
5. Makes 2 1/2 cups.
